nodes.name: Save Intake Data to Brand Sheet

parameters.subject: =Ascenda: {{ $json.brandName }} - Approved for Phase 2 (Score: {{ $json.score }})
parameters.message:
Congratulations, {{ $json.brandName }}!

Your brand has been approved to advance to Phase 2: Compliance & Due Diligence.

Readiness Score: {{ $json.score }}/100

Revenue Scale{{ $json.breakdown.revenue }}/25
Retailer Fit{{ $json.breakdown.retailerFit }}/20
Product Quality{{ $json.breakdown.productQuality }}/25
Market Readiness{{ $json.breakdown.marketReadiness }}/15
Economics{{ $json.breakdown.economics }}/10
Category Fit{{ $json.breakdown.categoryFit }}/5

Our team will send your compliance document checklist within 24 hours.

Ascenda Group | Sam's Club & Costco Retail Readiness

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, id: $json.id, score: $json.score, routing: 'AUTO_APPROVE', message: $json.routingReason }) }}

parameters.subject: =Ascenda: {{ $json.brandName }} - Under Committee Review (Score: {{ $json.score }})
parameters.message:
Thank you, {{ $json.brandName }}

Your application is under committee review. A member of our team will contact you within 48 business hours.

Your Score: {{ $json.score }}/100

We may request additional information to complete our evaluation.

Ascenda Group | Sam's Club & Costco Retail Readiness

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, id: $json.id, score: $json.score, routing: 'MANUAL_REVIEW', message: $json.routingReason }) }}

parameters.subject: =Ascenda: Application Update for {{ $json.brandName }}
parameters.message:
Application Update

Thank you for your interest in working with Ascenda Group. At this time, {{ $json.brandName }} does not meet our current threshold for the Sam's Club/Costco roadshow program.

Score: {{ $json.score }}/100

Common areas for improvement:

  • Revenue scale and market traction
  • Pricing alignment with warehouse club economics
  • Insurance and compliance readiness

We encourage you to reapply in 6 months after addressing these areas.

Ascenda Group | Sam's Club & Costco Retail Readiness

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, id: $json.id, score: $json.score, routing: 'AUTO_REJECT', message: $json.routingReason }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ brandName: $json.brandName, category: $json.category, revenue: $json.revenue, retailer: $json.retailer, spreadsheetId: $json.spreadsheetId || $json.id, email: $json.email }) }}

main.node: Save Intake Data to Brand Sheet

meta.description: Phase 1 brand intake: validates form data, scores 0-100 across 6 categories, logs ALL fields to master sheet, routes to approve/review/reject. Approved brands get Drive folder, brand spreadsheet, calendar event, and auto-trigger to WF-02.
